subject: BWSS x SNGS Library Society Collaboration, Read for Books July and Website Write up
one_line_summary: We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.
longer_summary:
📧 **Subject:** BWSS x SNGS Library Society Collaboration, Read for Books July and Website Write up
👤 **From:** {address: "lucia_wu@students.edu.sg", name;
🔗 **No links found**

📝 Dear Lucia, Please also work with Exco to plan for the running of the Read for Books VIA in our library for the month of July (1- 31 July). I have ccd the exco in this email.  As for previous year, please do find out from Kaelyn about the reading slots to be organised during recess / after school. Please get Caylia to help you on this. We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.  Also we need the website report to be done for the year with the activities for 2026. You can see the sample done for 2025 on t
body:
Dear Lucia,
Please also work with Exco to plan for the running of the Read for Books
VIA in our library for the month of July (1- 31 July). I have ccd the exco
in this email.

As for previous year, please do find out from Kaelyn about the reading
slots to be organised during recess / after school. Please get Caylia to
help you on this.
We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up
sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.

Also we need the website report to be done for the year with the activities
for 2026. You can see the sample done for 2025 on the school website and
use this template but the content will have to be re-written for all the
paragraphs as our activities for 2026 are different and include a suitable
quote. (Leave a space for results and outcomes that are pending but state
the title and short description).
Competitions such as Prove It 2026 - results are still pending and this
year we are doing Page to Pitch, the Summit, Collaboration with Pubs and
Bowen etc
Do get exco members to help you to draft the website report and ensure that
the statements are written with correct grammar and facts etc

Thank you
Warm regards
Mrs Tan

subject: Thinking of you from across the world...
one_line_summary: You can buy Apple gift cards or send a quick Bitcoin transfer to the clearance agent.
longer_summary:
📧 **Subject:** Thinking of you from across the world...
👤 **From:** {address: "luciafrancinewu@gmail.com", name;
🔗 **No links found**

body:
Hello my dearest,
I hope this message finds you well and safe. I am writing to you from our
military base camp here in Syria. It is a very difficult and stressful
environment, but reading your last message was the only bright light in my
day.
Being deployed out here makes you realize what is truly important in life.
It gets very lonely, and I have spent many nights looking at the stars,
wishing I had a special, honest partner to share my life with when I return
home next month. I truly believe that meeting you online was destiny.
I tried to call you on FaceTime yesterday, but the base security protocols
are very strict. The military authorities block our video streaming
capabilities to protect our location data, so I can only send text emails.
It breaks my heart that I cannot see your beautiful face.
A major problem has just come up. I requested an emergency leave allowance
to fly out and finally be with you, but the administrative office requires
a "leave processing fee" of $67,000 to release my transit passport. Because
I am deployed in a combat zone, my personal bank accounts are locked for
security until I return to civilian soil.
Could you please help me cover this fee? You can buy Apple gift cards or
send a quick Bitcoin transfer to the clearance agent. I am so ashamed to
ask this of you, but you are the only person I trust in this world. I will
hand you the cash to repay you the second I step off the plane.
Please save me from this place so we can start our life together.
Yours faithfully,
Capt. James Rogers
